AttorneyBadge.name: Attorney's Badge
AttorneyBadge.description: My symbol of justice. I should probably show it to everyone.

Cigar.name: Burnt Cigar
Cigar.description: Found near the body. Smells expensive.

0.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_moderato,true}{showLifeBar}{courtView:witness}{blip:1,true}{courtSprite:witness["Normal"]}The defendant was found at the scene with a smoking gun, pal!

1.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_moderato,true}{showLifeBar}{courtView:witness}{blip:1,true}{courtSprite:witness["Confident"]}I saw him standin' there with my own eyes!

1a.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_moderato,true}{showLifeBar}{courtView:witness}{blip:1,true}{courtSprite:witness["Normal"]}I even saw the defendant's red tie with my own eyes!

2.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_moderato,true}{showLifeBar}{courtView:witness}{blip:1,true}{courtSprite:witness["Confident"]}And he was definitely smoking that expensive cigar we found!

Intro.text: {setSkipEnabled:false}{courtView:overview}{courtSprite:witness["Normal"]}{courtSprite:prosecution["Normal"]}{courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}{courtSprite:judge["Normal"]}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Normal"]}{courtSprite:gallery["Normal"]}{center}{blip:3}Courtroom{nl}Cross Examination Test{playSound:galleryReaction}{p:2000}{skip:0}

Intro.name: Judge
Intro.text: {setSkipEnabled:true}{playAnimation:Gavel}{startBGM:courtroom,true}{addEvidence:AttorneyBadge,false}{addEvidence:Cigar,false}{courtView:judge}{courtSprite:judge["Normal"]}{blip:1}The court is now in session for the trial of the defendant.

Intro.name: Judge
Intro.text: Are the defense and prosecution prepared to begin?

Intro.name: Phoenix
Intro.text: {courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}{blip:1}The defense is ready, Your Honor.

Intro.name: Edgeworth
Intro.text: {courtView:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Normal"]}{blip:1}The prosecution is ready as well.

Intro.name: Edgeworth
Intro.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Confident"]}{blip:1}The facts are straightforward. Detective Gumshoe found the defendant at the scene, and the evidence appeared to support that conclusion.

Intro.name: Phoenix
Intro.text: {courtPan:defense,500}{courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(Edgeworth already sounds certain of the verdict...)

Intro.name: Maya
Intro.text: {courtView:cocounsel}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Determined"]}{blip:2,true}Then all we need is one contradiction, Nick. Keep listening.

Intro.name: Phoenix
Intro.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Determined"]}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(Right. If the detective's story slips even once, that's my opening.)

Intro.name: Judge
Intro.text: {courtView:judge}{courtSprite:judge["Normal"]}{blip:1}The prosecution may call its first witness.

Intro.name: Edgeworth
Intro.text: {courtView:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Normal"]}{blip:1}The prosecution calls Detective Dick Gumshoe to the stand.

Intro.name: Gumshoe
Intro.text: {courtPan:witness,600}{courtSprite:witness["Confident"]}{blip:1}Detective Dick Gumshoe, reporting for duty, sir!

Intro.name: Gumshoe
Intro.text: {courtSprite:witness["Normal"]}I was one of the first officers at the scene, and I checked the area myself, pal.

Intro.name: Judge
Intro.text: {courtView:judge}{courtSprite:judge["Nod"]}Very well.{p:300}{courtSprite:judge["Normal"]} Give the court your testimony.
{stopBGM:false}{courtView:witness}{blip:0,false}{hideTextbox}{playAnimation:Witness_Testimony}{skip:100}
{showTextbox}{color:lightBlue}{center}--The Night in Question--{color:white}

Intro.name: Gumshoe
Intro.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_moderato,true}{blip:1,true}{courtSprite:witness["Normal"]}The defendant was found at the scene with a smoking gun, pal!

Intro.name: Gumshoe
Intro.text: {courtSprite:witness["Confident"]}I saw him standin' there with my own eyes!

Intro.name: Gumshoe
Intro.text: And he was definitely smoking that expensive cigar we found!

Intro.name: Phoenix
Intro.text: {stopBGM}{courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(The timeline is shaky, the details are too convenient... and that cigar is bothering me.)

Intro.name: Phoenix
Intro.text: {courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{blip:1}Your Honor, the defense requests permission to cross-examine the witness.

Intro.name: Judge
Intro.text: {courtView:judge}{courtSprite:judge["Normal"]}{blip:1}You may proceed, Mr. Wright.
{courtView:witness}{blip:3}{center}{color:red}{playAnimation:CrossExamination}--The Night in Question--{color:white}
{startCE:Gumshoe_Testimony}{sectionEnd}

Press_Statement_1.name: Phoenix
Press_Statement_1.text: {playSound:PhoenixHoldIt}{playAnimation:HoldIt}{showTextbox}{courtPan:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Pointing"]}{blip:1,true}A smoking gun? Are you absolutely sure about that?

Press_Statement_1.name: Gumshoe
Press_Statement_1.text: {courtView:witness}{courtSprite:witness["Confident"]}Well, it was... you know, smoky!{p:200} I could smell the gunpowder all the way from the door!

Press_Statement_2.name: Phoenix
Press_Statement_2.text: {playSound:PhoenixHoldIt}{playAnimation:HoldIt}{showTextbox}{courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Pointing"]}{blip:1,true}How clear was your view of the defendant?

Press_Statement_2.name: Gumshoe
Press_Statement_2.text: {courtView:witness}{courtSprite:witness["Confident"]}Crystal clear, pal! I've got 20/20 vision when it comes to crime scenes!

Press_Statement_2.name: Gumshoe
Press_Statement_2.text: I even saw the defendant's bright red tie!{p:200} It was standin' out like a sore thumb!

Press_Red_Tie_Detail.name: Phoenix
Press_Red_Tie_Detail.text: {playSound:PhoenixHoldIt}{playAnimation:HoldIt}{showTextbox}{courtPan:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Pointing"]}{blip:1,true}You're positive he was wearing a red tie?

Press_Red_Tie_Detail.name: Gumshoe
Press_Red_Tie_Detail.text: {courtView:witness}{courtSprite:witness["Normal"]}That's right! Bright red! I'd recognize that fashion disaster anywhere!

Press_Statement_3.name: Phoenix
Press_Statement_3.text: {playSound:PhoenixHoldIt}{playAnimation:HoldIt}{showTextbox}{courtPan:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}{blip:1,true}You're claiming with absolute certainty he was smoking a cigar?

Press_Statement_3.name: Gumshoe
Press_Statement_3.text: {courtView:witness}{courtSprite:witness["Confident"]}That's right, pal! The smell was everywhere!{p:200} I could practically taste it in the air!

CE_Hints.name: Maya
CE_Hints.text: {hideLifeBar}{courtView:cocounsel}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Thinking"]}{blip:2,true}That cigar statement is still bugging me, Nick.

CE_Hints.name: Phoenix
CE_Hints.text: {blip:1,false}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Normal"]}Me too. If the evidence says it never burned, his whole conclusion falls apart.

CE_Fail.name: Edgeworth
CE_Fail.text: {showTextbox}{showLifeBar:1}{courtView:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Thinking"]}{blip:1,true}Mr. Wright, flailing at random evidence will not save your case.

CE_Fail.name: Judge
CE_Fail.text: {courtView:judge}{courtSprite:judge["Normal"]}I must agree. Please be more careful, or I shall have no choice but to penalize you.{p:400}{playSound:damage}{flash}{lifeMod:-1}

CE_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE_Victory.text: {courtSprite:defense["HoldingDocument"]}{showTextbox}{blip:1,true}Detective, this cigar destroys the certainty of your entire testimony.

CE_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE_Victory.text: According to the police report, it was found COMPLETELY unlit near the victim's body!

CE_Victory.name: Gumshoe
CE_Victory.text: {courtView:witness}{courtSprite:witness["Sad"]}W-What?!{p:400} But... but I was so sure it was SMOKIN'!{p:300} How could I have been wrong?!

CE_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE_Victory.text: {courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Confident"]}It's simple. If the cigar wasn't lit, then there was no smoke and no smell to fill the room the way the witness described!{endCE}

CE_Victory.name: Judge
CE_Victory.text: {startBGM:courtroom,true}{courtView:judge}{courtSprite:judge["Surprised"]}An excellent observation, Mr. Wright.{p:250}{courtSprite:judge["Normal"]} That contradiction strikes at the heart of the witness's account.

CE_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE_Victory.text: {courtView:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Thinking"]}...Hmph. It would seem the detective reached his conclusion too quickly.{checkpoint:Success_End}

CE_Victory.name: Maya
CE_Victory.text: {courtView:cocounsel}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Normal"]}{blip:2,true}Nice one, Nick! That was the crack we needed!

CE_Victory.name: Judge
CE_Victory.text: {courtView:judge}{courtSprite:judge["Stern"]}The court will demand a revised testimony. For now, the defense has established a clear contradiction.
